name: notes-app-mern
description: A full-stack Notes Management Application built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). This application allows users to create, read, update, and delete notes with a modern UI and a secure backend that includes rate limiting and database integration.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend/notes-app-react && npm run build --prefix frontend/notes-app-react
